---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for AIAAR
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added to AIAAR.

## Problem Statement
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Use Case
**Describe the use case for this feature:**
- Who would benefit from this feature?
- What business scenario would this address?
- How would this improve the automation workflow?

## Proposed Solution
**Describe the solution you'd like:**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Affected Components:**
- [ ] Make.com Scenarios
- [ ] eBay API Integration
- [ ] OpenAI Analysis
- [ ] Airtable Database
- [ ] PayPal Integration
- [ ] Email/Notification System
- [ ] Analytics/Reporting
- [ ] Configuration
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Detailed Description
**Provide additional details about the feature:**
- How should it work from a user perspective?
- What new data fields or processes would be needed?
- Should this be configurable or always-on?
- Any specific business rules or logic requirements?

## Expected Behavior
**What should happen when this feature is implemented?**
- Step-by-step description of the new workflow
- Expected inputs and outputs
- Integration points with existing scenarios

## Alternative Solutions
**Describe alternatives you've considered:**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Implementation Considerations
**Technical considerations (if known):**
- API limitations or requirements
- Make.com scenario complexity
- Data storage needs
- Performance implications
- Security considerations

## Additional Context
**Add any other context, mockups, or examples:**
- Screenshots or mockups of desired behavior
- Examples from other systems
- Links to relevant documentation
- Business impact or priority level

## Acceptance Criteria
**How will we know this feature is complete?**
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
